titleStmt.title: SII 11.124: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 124. (B.K. No. 237 of 1928-29.) MORAB, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE KALAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription which belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) describes his vassal, Traiḷōkyamalla Vīra-Noḷaṁba-Pallava-Permāḍi Jayasiṅghadēva ‘of the Pallava family’, who bears the epithets yuvarāja, rājaparamēśvara, and Chāḷukya-chūḍāmaṇi and refers to him as the king's brother. He held the status of yuvarāja and was governing over [Kōgaḷe] One-Thousand, Kandūr One-Thousand, Puligeṟe Three Hundred and Beḷuvala Three-Hundred. On the occasion of the Mahādānas connected with the Tulāpurusha and the Hiraṇyagarbha ceremonies performed by him, at the request of his subordinates Mahāpradhāna, Hērilāḷa-Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Saṅkharayya-Nāyaka and Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Manevergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Madhuvapayya-Nāyaka, the prince renamed the big tank at Moraba in Beḷuvala-nāḍu as Noḷaṁba-samudra and granted land for its maintenance, to the twelve Gāvuṇḍas of the village, as a Paramēśvaradatti.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 3, Piṅgaḷa, Phāḷguṇa, puṇṇame, Sunday, lunar eclipse. Piṅgaḷa was actually Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 2. In this year, there was no lunar eclipse in Phālguṇa; but there was one in Śrāvaṇa, on śu. 15, Sunday = A.D. 1077, August 6. Phālguṇa is evidently a mistake for Śrāvaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tadānujaṁ samastabhu vanasaṁstū
yamāna lōkavikhyāta pallavānvayaśrīmahīvallabhaṁ yuvarāja rājaparamēśvaraṁ vīrama
hēśvaraṁ vikramābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ saraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kada
netrinētraṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ mataṁgajāṁgarājaṁ sahajamanōja ripurāyakaṭakasūṟe
kāṟa naṇnanaṁkakāraṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamallavīranoḷaṁbapallava permmāḍi jayasiṅghadēvar
yuvarājapadaviyiṁ kōgaḷesāsiramumaṁ kandūrasāsiramumaṁ puligeṟe mūnūṟu
maṁ beḷuvala mūnūṟuma nanteraḍaṟunūṟumanāḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttu
mire śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 3 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada phālguṇada puṇname Ādityavāra
muṁ sōmagrahaṇamuṁ kūḍi banda puṇyadinadoḷētagiriya nelevīḍino ltuḷāpuruṣamuṁ hiraṇya
garbhbhamuma niḻdaṁdina mahādānakāḷado ḷtatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷ samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ hērilāḷakannaḍasandhivigrahi da(ṁ)ṇḍanāyakaṁ saṁkharayyanāyakaruṁ samastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati maneverggaḍe da(ṁ)ṇḍanāyakaṁ madhuvapayyanāyakaru ma
ntavarirvvara binnapadiṁ beḷuvalanāḍa baḷiya morabada pannirvvarggāvuṇḍugaḷgalli yūra paḍu
vaṇa piriyakeṟege noḷaṁbasamudrameṁba pesaraṁ koṭṭu paramēśvaradattiyāgi
maśyaṁ biṭṭa keyge sīme yūriṁ teṁka ghaṭāntakiya basadiya dānasāleya namaśya
morabada baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa lalagarapoladiṁ paḍuva ladiṁ baḍaga mūlasthāna di
valuṁ baḍagaluṁ mā ya baṭṭeya mūḍa mattarmmūvattu Adaṟoḷage pūrvvigaṁ bai
ballagāvuṇḍaṁ tanna daydu mattarkkeyyumaṁ nūṟiṁ mūḍa tamma gaḷi sida baysa
ge biṭṭaṁ ghaṭāntakiyabasadiya ke
baḍaga mattarppattu Antaraḍu sthaḷadoḷaṁ namaśyaṁ mattar nālvattu Aṁkadoḷaṁ mattar 40 .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētaṁ
bhāginaḻprārtivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . madvaṁśajā ḥ paramahī
pativaṁśajā yā �pādapētamanasā bhuvi bāvibhūpā va pāḷayaṁti mama dharmmamimaṁ
staṁ �śāṁ mayā viracitā jaḷirēśa mūrdhni . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktaṁ rājabhissagarādi
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēta vasundharāṁ saṣṭhirvvarśasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
